content.title: CS 61B Data Structures - Fall 2020
content.body:
# CS 61B Data Structures - Fall 2020
**URL**: https://fa20.datastructur.es/
**Institution**: UC Berkeley
**Instructor**: Josh Hug

## Course Overview
This is the main course website for CS 61B Data Structures, a core computer science course at UC Berkeley covering data structures and algorithms.

## Site Structure
- **Main Page**: Announcements, calendar, weekly updates
- **Course Info**: Detailed policies, grading, collaboration rules, exam info
- **Staff**: Course staff information
- **Resources**: Extensive collection of study materials

## External Tools
- **Beacon** (beacon.datastructur.es): Gradebook and assignment tracking
- **Ed** (edstem.org): Discussion forum
- **OH Queue** (oh.datastructur.es): Office hours queue

## Resources Available
- Exam review worksheets and solutions
- Past exam review documents (Spring 2018)
- Guerrilla section materials
- HKN past exam archive
- Java documentation links
- Git/GitHub guides
- Study guides

## Course Policies Highlights
- Weekly check-in surveys
- HW and Lab assignments with collaboration policies
- Programming projects (with partners allowed)
- Exam supersession policy
- Gold Points and Pacing Points grade boosting
- Amnesty submissions for late work
- Slip days for lateness

## Archived Course
Note: This is an archived course from Fall 2020. Some links to external services (Ed, Beacon, OH Queue) may no longer be active.
